Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDPS889 or TLPL889.

Formerly: EDPS889.

TLPL898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits) Credit Only Granted for. EDPS898 or TLPL898. Formerly: EDPS898.

TLPL899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)

Registration required to the extent of 6-9 hours for an Ed.D. Project and 12-18 hours for a Ph.D. Dissertation.
